notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo grounds into a double play, first baseman Ty France to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to pitcher Griffin Canning. Pete Alonso out at 2nd. Samuel Basallo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Samad Taylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Samad Taylor grounds into a double play, second baseman Jackson Holliday to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Gavin Sheets out at 2nd. Samad Taylor out at 1st.
